context: This criteria evaluates whether the agent follows the intended two-step workflow for larger passage retrieval instead of stopping after the first snippet.

checklist.name: identifies the correct book
checklist.description: Correctly identifies the target book and reports its real book_id from the fixture library.

checklist.name: uses search then excerpt workflow
checklist.description: Uses a two-step workflow: first locate the hit, then pull a larger passage around it.

checklist.name: returns a longer excerpt around the match
checklist.description: Returns a passage longer than a minimal snippet and centered on the requested match, clearly drawn from the target book.

checklist.name: brief method explanation
checklist.description: Briefly explains the approach used for the initial hit and the expanded excerpt.
